ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  ABM Knowledgeware Limited has intimated its intention to pay a final dividend of Rs. 1.25 per equity share (25% of face value) for the financial year 2025-26, pending shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting on July 30, 2026. The record date for determining eligible shareholders is July 23, 2026, with the dividend payment, if approved, scheduled on or before August 29, 2026. This represents a planned cash return for investors and a corresponding cash outflow for the company, with no immediate red flags identified in this standard regulatory disclosure.
